mapper.select:
select f6.sys_id AS outSysId ,f6.SYS_SOURCE AS outOobjSource from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid
f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1
and UPPER(obj_engname) = UPPER(#{tableId})

select f6.sys_id as outSysId , f6.SYS_SOURCE as outOobjSource, obj_engname as outObjEngName from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1

select inputSysId, inputObjEngName, sourceTableName, dataId, tableId, centerId, inputObjChiName, inputIobjSource, iorStatus, outSysId, outObjEngName, outObjChiName, outOobjSource, insertDate, tableRealName from (select f4.sys_id as inputSysId, f4.obj_engname as inputObjEngName, f4.obj_chiname as sourceTableName, f4.data_id as dataId, f4.table_id as tableId, f4.center_Id as centerId, case when f4.obj_memo is not null then f4.obj_memo else f4.OBJ_CHINAME end as inputObjChiName, f4.iobj_source as inputIobjSource, f1.IOR_STATUS as iorStatus, f7.sys_id AS outSysId, f7.obj_engname AS outObjEngName, f7.obj_chiname AS outObjChiName, f7.oobj_source AS outOobjSource, f4.insert_date as insertDate, case when f4.data_id is not null then f4.table_id else f8.tablename end as tableRealName from standardize_inputobjectrelate f1 inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, data_id, table_id, OBJ_CHINAME, iobj_source, iobj_guid, insert_date, obj_memo, center_Id from standardize_inputobject f2 inner join standardize_object f3 on f3.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) f4 on f1.iobj_guid = f4.iobj_guid inner join (select oobj_guid, sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, OBJ_CHINAME, oobj_source from standardize_outputobject f5 inner join standardize_object f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1) f7 on f1.OOBJ_GUID = f7.oobj_guid left join (select tablename, tableid from synlte.OBJECT) f8 on f8.tableid = f4.OBJ_ENGNAME)
iorStatus = 1
and UPPER(outObjEngName) = UPPER(#{tableId})
order by insertDate desc

select obj_chiname as inputObjChiName, t.tablename as tableRealName, sys_id as inputSysId, sys_source as inputIobjSource, obj_engname as inputObjEngName, iobj_guid as objGuid from (select obj_chiname, sys_id, sys_source, obj_engname, iobj_guid from standardize_inputobject f2 inner join standardize_object f3 on f3.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) so right join (select sourceid, tablename from (select sourceid, tablename from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' order by sourceid desc) x where upper(tablename) = upper(#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and rownum = 1 and sourceid is not null) t on upper(t.sourceid) = upper(so.obj_engname)
mapper.insert: insert into STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE( IOBJ_GUID, OOBJ_GUID, IOR_MEMO, IOR_STATUS, IOR_SOURCE ) values ( #{inputObjGuid}, #{outputObjGuid}, '', 1, #{inputIobjSource} )
mapper.delete: delete from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE where IOBJ_GUID = #{inputGuid} and OOBJ_GUID = #{outputGuid}
mapper.update: update STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE set IOR_STATUS = 1 where IOBJ_GUID = #{inputObjGuid} and OOBJ_GUID= #{outputObjGuid} and IOR_SOURCE=#{inputIobjSource}
mapper.select: select OBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_object where UPPER(OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT into STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT(OBJ_GUID , OOBJ_RESERVENAME_XML , OOBJ_TYPE , OOBJ_STATUS ,OOBJ_SOURCE) values(#{objGuid} , #{xml} , #{oobjType} , #{oobjStatus} ,#{oobjSource})
mapper.select: select max(OBJECTID) from synlte.OBJECT
mapper.update: update STANDARDIZE_object set SYS_ID = #{codeTextTd} , OBJ_CHINAME=#{dataSourceName} , SYS_SOURCE =#{ownerFactory} where UPPER(OBJ_GUID) = UPPER(#{oobjGuidStr})
mapper.select: select d.obj_guid from ( select f1.obj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f1 where UPPER(OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{sourceProtocol}) and SYS_ID = #{sourceSystem} and SYS_SOURCE = #{sourceFirm}) d where d.obj_guid not in( select f2.OBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 inner join STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f3 on f2.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid ) and rownum = 1

select COUNT(*) from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE F4 INNER join (select * from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT F1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT F2 ON F1.OBJ_GUID = F2.OBJ_GUID WHERE upper(F2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId})) F3 ON F3.OOBJ_GUID = F4.OOBJ_GUID where f4.iobj_guid =#{inputObjGuid}
select oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT F1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT F2 ON F1.OBJ_GUID = F2.OBJ_GUID WHERE upper(F2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1

select SJXJBM from ( select SJXJBM from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where UPPER(SJXJZWMC) = UPPER(#{tableName}) and SJXJBM is not null UNION all select SJXJBM from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where UPPER(TABLENAME) = UPPER(#{tableName}) and SJXJBM is not null ) where rownum = 1
select count(*) from synlte.object where upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId})
select tableid from synlte.object where objectid=#{objectId}
SELECT count(*) from synlte.object where upper(OBJECTID) = upper(#{objectId})
mapper.update: UPDATE synlte.object set TABLEID =upper(#{newTableId}) where upper(TABLEID) =upper(#{oldTableId})
mapper.select: select F2.OBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT F1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT F2 ON F1.OBJ_GUID = F2.OBJ_GUID WHERE upper(F2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId}) and f2.SYS_ID=#{sysId} and f2.SYS_SOURCE=#{ownerFactoryNum} and rownum = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE STANDARDIZE_OBJECT set OBJ_ENGNAME = upper(#{newTableId}) where OBJ_GUID=#{objGuid}
mapper.select: select count(d.obj_guid) from ( select f1.obj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f1 INNER join Standardize_Outputobject f3 on f1.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid where UPPER(f1.OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId})) d where d.obj_guid not in( select f2.obj_GUID from Standardize_Inputobject f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid )
select f1.oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where UPPER(f2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1

select d.obj_guid from ( select f1.obj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f1 left join Standardize_Outputobject f3 on f1.obj_guid = f3.obj_guid where UPPER(OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId})) d where d.obj_guid not in( select f2.obj_GUID from Standardize_Inputobject f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid ) and rownum = 1

select obj_guid from standardize_object f3 where f3.obj_guid not in( select f2.obj_GUID from Standardize_Inputobject f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid) and upper(f3.obj_engname) = upper(#{tableId}) and f3.sys_id = #{sysId}
select count(*) from synlte.object where upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId}) and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName})
select tablename from synlte.object where objectid =#{objectId}

select distinct outobjengname as value ,objectname as label from( SELECT outobjengname, objectname FROM ( SELECT f4.sys_id as inputSysId, f4.OBJ_ENGNAME as inputObjEngName , f4.data_id as dataId, f4.table_id as tableId, f4.OBJ_CHINAME as inputObjChiName ,f4.IOBJ_SOURCE as inputIobjSource , f1.IOR_STATUS as iorStatus,f7.sys_id AS outSysId , f7.OBJ_ENGNAME AS outObjEngName , f7.OBJ_CHINAME AS outObjChiName , f7.OOBJ_SOURCE AS outOobjSource, f8.tablename as tableRealName, f8.objectname as objectname FROM STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE f1 inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, data_id, table_id, OBJ_CHINAME, IOBJ_SOURCE, IOBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECT f2 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f3 on f3.OBJ_GUID = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) f4 on upper(f1.IOBJ_GUID) = upper(f4.IOBJ_GUID) inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, OBJ_CHINAME, OOBJ_SOURCE,oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1) f7 on upper(f1.OOBJ_GUID) = upper(f7.oobj_guid) inner join (select tablename ,tableid ,objectname from synlte.OBJECT where deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' and upper(sourceid) = upper(#{sourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ) f8 on upper(f8.tableid) = upper(f7.OBJ_ENGNAME) )where iorStatus = 1 ) t1

select count(distinct outobjengname) as value from(SELECT outobjengname FROM ( SELECT f4.sys_id as inputSysId, f4.OBJ_ENGNAME as inputObjEngName , f4.data_id as dataId, f4.table_id as tableId, f4.OBJ_CHINAME as inputObjChiName ,f4.IOBJ_SOURCE as inputIobjSource , f1.IOR_STATUS as iorStatus,f7.sys_id AS outSysId , f7.OBJ_ENGNAME AS outObjEngName , f7.OBJ_CHINAME AS outObjChiName , f7.OOBJ_SOURCE AS outOobjSource, f8.tablename as tableRealName, f8.objectname as objectname FROM STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE f1 inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, data_id, table_id, OBJ_CHINAME, IOBJ_SOURCE ,IOBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECT f2 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f3 on f3.OBJ_GUID = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) f4 on upper(f1.IOBJ_GUID) = upper(f4.IOBJ_GUID) inner join (select oobj_guid, sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, OBJ_CHINAME, OOBJ_SOURCE from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1) f7 on upper(f1.OOBJ_GUID) = upper(f7.oobj_guid) inner join (select tablename ,tableid ,objectname from synlte.OBJECT where deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) f8 on upper(f8.tableid) = upper(f7.OBJ_ENGNAME) )where iorStatus = 1 and upper(dataId) = upper(#{dataId}) ) t1

select (case when UPDATETIME is null then '' else to_char(UPDATETIME,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') end ) as updateTime , OBJECTNAME as dataSourceName,DATATYPE as dataType,OBJECTSTATE as storageTableStatus,OBJECTID as objectId, HIVETABLENAME as realTablename,STORETYPE as storageDataMode,DATA_SOURCE as codeTextTd,sourceid as sourceId, ISACTIVETABLE as isActiveTable,UPDATER as updater,VERSION as version, objectstate as storageTableStatus,objectmemo as objectMemo,VERSIONS as versions,TABLEID as tableId, SECRETLEVEL as dataLevel,SJZYBQ1 as sjzybq1,SJZYBQ2 as sjzybq2,SJZYBQ3 as sjzybq3,SJZYBQ4 as sjzybq4, SJZYBQ5 as sjzybq5,SJZYBQ6 as sjzybq1,SJZZYJFLVALLUE as SJZZYJFLVALLUE,SJZZEJFLVALUE as SJZZEJFLVALUE, SJZYLYLXVALUE as SJZYLYLXVALUE from synlte.OBJECT where objectid = #{objectId}
